name: Web scraping to Sheets: scrape URLs, AI structures data, save to Sheets
description: Scrapes one or more URLs using Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract and structure the data into a clean tabular format, and saves the results to a new Google Sheets spreadsheet.

source.originalName: AI powered web scraping with Jina, Google Sheets and OpenAI : the EASY way

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving data

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status notification

dataDescription.description: What data to extract (e.g. 'product names and prices', 'company names and contact info', 'article titles and dates')

sheetTitle.description: Title for the Google Sheets spreadsheet

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for structured data extraction
Run Claude AI for data extraction
Save extracted data to Google Sheets
